hardwareFailureClaim.description: Device motherboard malfunction causing random restarts and overheating. Started 3 days ago.

accidentalDamageClaim.description: Screen cracked after device slipped from desk onto tile floor. Display partially functional.

liquidDamageClaim.description: Water spilled on device. Touchscreen unresponsive and speaker distorted.

batteryReplacementClaim.description: Battery drains from 100% to 0% within 2 hours. Battery health shows 64%.

duplicateClaim.description: Duplicate claim for testing fraud detection
